## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (or N/A)
- [ ] Manually tested in `npm run electron:dev`
- [ ] No unrelated formatting / refactor noise in the diff
